findings.name: false_block_negated_execution_scan
findings.meaning: Some blocked cases contain negated execution wording such as 'sem executar' or 'sem enviar'. These require human review because they may not be true execution requests.

findings.name: over_conservative_review_scan
findings.meaning: Some review packets may be too conservative and could become ALLOW_WITH_WARNING or EVIDENCE_REQUEST after human approval.

findings.name: false_allow_scan
findings.meaning: All allowed/warning outputs must be scanned before pilot expansion.
